title: Interview Scheduling
instruction: HR coordinator Lisa Nguyen sent an email with subject "Interview Slots — Backend Engineer" listing 5 available times. Three interviewers each sent emails stating which slots they cannot attend: Marco Singh (subject "My availability — Backend interviews"), Priya Chen (in a thread with subject "Re: Panel schedule update"), and Avery Brooks (subject "Scheduling conflicts this week"). Find the one slot where all three interviewers are available. Reply to Lisa Nguyen's email with the selected slot written as "Confirmed: Wednesday, 2:00 PM" and CC marco.singh@ops.test, priya.chen@ops.test, and avery.brooks@ops.test.

emails.subject: Agenda draft for Monday check-in
emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Theo

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Nothing looks blocked right now, but we still need one decision on timing. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Avery

emails.subject: Notes from the partner sync
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Miles

emails.subject: My availability — Frontend interviews
emails.body:
For the frontend panel: I can only do Thursday 9 AM. Block everything else.

Thanks,
Marco

emails.subject: Interview Slots — Frontend Designer
emails.body:
Hi,

Here are the interview slots for the Frontend Designer position:

Available times:
- Tuesday 10:00 AM
- Wednesday 1:00 PM
- Thursday 3:00 PM
- Friday 11:00 AM

Thanks,
Rachel

emails.subject: Scheduling conflicts this week
emails.body:
Hi,

Monday 10 AM and Tuesday 11 AM are out for me. The rest of the week is flexible.

Thanks,
Avery

emails.subject: Re: Panel schedule update
emails.body:
Actually, I need to block Tuesday 11 AM and Thursday 9 AM — client call. Everything else is open.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Re: Panel schedule update
emails.body:
I can do most days, will confirm conflicts shortly.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: My availability — Backend interviews
emails.body:
Hey,

For the backend panel: I cannot do Monday 10 AM, Thursday 9 AM, or Friday 3 PM. The other two slots work fine for me.

Thanks,
Marco

emails.subject: Interview Slots — Backend Engineer
emails.body:
Hi,

Here are the available interview slots for the Backend Engineer role. Please coordinate with the panel to confirm which slot works for everyone.

Available times:
- Monday 10:00 AM
- Tuesday 11:00 AM
- Wednesday 2:00 PM
- Thursday 9:00 AM
- Friday 3:00 PM

Let me know the confirmed slot and I'll send the calendar invite.

Thanks,
Lisa
